name: szcs-from-style-chain
description: Char style SzCsChar: sz=24, szCs=32, ascii='Arial', cs='David'. Run 1: rStyle=SzCsChar + direct cs=true. Run 2: rStyle=SzCsChar, no cs.
expected_behavior: Run 1: cs -> font_size=32 (szCs), font_family='David'. Run 2: no cs -> font_size=24 (sz), font_family='Arial'.
current_status: GAP-137 — szCs from style chain with direct cs
